attributes.action: Condemn US military action in Iran & provide zero military support
attributes.additional_details: The US have provided no evidence of an immediate nuclear threat by Iran. UNESCO states the bombing of a school during US & Israeli military attacks is a violation of humanitarian law and experts claim strikes are unlawful. Use of British bases by US bombers has drawn us into the conflict. Strikes have resulted in tit for tat action across the Middle East & attacks on British bases. The conflict could escalate out of control into WW3. Previous Western military action in the Middle East has failed
attributes.background:
Illegal military action must be unconditionally condemned.
The British Government must not allow US aircraft to use British airfields to bomb Iran.
Britain must not supply the US or Israel with any weapons or military support to carry out the attacks. Britain must take action to facilitate peace.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Withdraw involvement in war on Iran and seek diplomatic resolution" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761718
